heading: Organization
label: 200301 Organization
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20030136:531., §§ 1, 2, 4(1), , 749.Aug. 20, 1954, ch. 77468 Stat. 74836:532.36:534(1).This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary and executed words.

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Sons of Union Veterans of the Civil War (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Place of Incorporation and Domicile
children.label: b .—Place of Incorporation and Domicile
children.text: The corporation is declared to be incorporated and domiciled in the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: c .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
